summary: Tested dividend comparison feature for FinRomania 2.0. All 9 backend API tests passed (100%). All 7 frontend feature checks passed (100%). Compare endpoint correctly validates 2-4 symbols, returns chart_data with yearly dividends, stocks with scores. Frontend shows checkboxes in rankings table, purple comparison bar on selection, grouped bar chart with correct colors (blue/green/amber).
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/bvb-dividends/compare?symbols=TLV,BRD,SNP — returns chart_data, stocks with scores, yearly dividends (9 years)
✅ Dividend scores have correct structure (score 0-100, rating, breakdown)
✅ Frontend: Rankings table has checkboxes for stock selection (data-testid='compare-check-{symbol}')
✅ Frontend: Selecting 3 stocks shows purple comparison bar with 'Compară' button
✅ Frontend: Clicking 'Compară' shows comparison panel with grouped bar chart
✅ Frontend: Stock summary cards display with scores (TLV: 80 Excelent, BRD: 46 Mediu, SNP: 86 Excelent)
✅ Frontend: Comparison chart has correct colors (blue=#3b82f6, green=#10b981, amber=#f59e0b)
✅ Frontend: Year-by-year table expandable section present (9 years of data)
✅ Frontend: PRO login via demo endpoint works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Compare endpoint correctly validates symbol count (2-4) with proper 400 error messages
EODHD API calls are made per symbol (~5-10s for 3 symbols) - consider caching compare results
Chart colors array in frontend matches expected: ['#3b82f6', '#10b981', '#f59e0b', '#f43f5e'] for up to 4 stocks
Score badges use correct color gradients matching rating labels (green for Excelent, orange for Mediu)
Comparison bar is sticky (top-20 z-10) for good UX when scrolling rankings table
data-testid attributes properly implemented: compare-check-{symbol}, compare-btn, compare-chart
seed_data_creation: None - used existing rankings cache from iteration 13
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dividend comparison feature fully tested and working. Key endpoint: /api/bvb-dividends/compare?symbols=SYM1,SYM2,SYM3 (2-4 symbols). Returns chart_data with yearly dividends, stocks with dividend_score. Frontend: click 'Istoric Dividende' tab, select 2-4 checkboxes (data-testid='compare-check-{symbol}'), click 'Compară' button (data-testid='compare-btn'). Comparison panel shows grouped bar chart (data-testid='compare-chart') with colors: blue, green, amber, rose for up to 4 stocks. API takes 5-10s due to EODHD calls per symbol.
